context.summary: WhatsApp changed their web interface, breaking sendSeen function. Fix is to pass sendSeen:false to sendMessage calls.

tasks: Update .gitmodules to point to kulemantu/wwebjs-api fork
Find all sendMessage calls in controller files
Add { sendSeen: false } option to all client.sendMessage() calls
Verify echo workflow processes messages correctly
verification: Echo workflow receives and processes messages
No markedUnread error in wwebjs-api logs
changelog: Fixed sendMessage API by disabling sendSeen (workaround for whatsapp-web.js #5718)
